name: USS Abraham Lincoln
area: Strait of Hormuz — convoy escort and retaliatory strike ops
aircraft: F/A-18E/F Super Hornets, EA-18G Growlers, E-2D Hawkeye
status: Engaged — convoy escort and retaliatory strike operations
notes: Primary strike platform for Operation Epic Fury. Day 14: Provided air cover for second escorted convoy (5 tankers). Air wing flew retaliatory strikes on IRGC coastal batteries at Bandar Abbas and Qeshm Island overnight. 230+ sorties/day.

name: USS Gerald R. Ford
area: Eastern Mediterranean — closer to Lebanese coast for ground support
aircraft: F/A-18E/F Super Hornets, F-35C Lightning II, EA-18G Growlers
status: Engaged — supporting IDF Lebanon ground operation and Iran strikes
notes: Day 14: Moved further toward Lebanese coast as IDF ground ops enter Day 2. F-35Cs supporting close air support near Bint Jbeil. F/A-18s continue deep strike missions into western Iran. Dual mission at maximum intensity.

name: USS George H.W. Bush
area: Gulf of Oman — southern convoy screening and ASW ops
aircraft: F/A-18E/F Super Hornets, EA-18G Growlers, E-2D Hawkeye
status: Engaged — convoy screen and southern interdiction
notes: Day 14: Continued southern screening for second convoy transit. ASW helicopters prosecuted possible submarine contact — results inconclusive. P-8 Poseidons from Bahrain augmenting coverage.

name: USS America
area: Strait of Hormuz — active convoy escort and mine countermeasures
aircraft: F-35B Lightning II, MV-22 Osprey, AH-1Z Viper, CH-53E Super Stallion
status: Standing by — mine countermeasures support, TRAP
notes: Day 14: Led mine countermeasures for second convoy (5 tankers). Cleared corridor widened to 1.2km. AH-1Z Vipers fired warning shots at approaching IRGC fast boats — boats withdrew. Marines remain at heightened readiness.

name: USS Paul Ignatius
area: Strait of Hormuz approaches — escort operations
notes: Day 14: Escorted second convoy (5 tankers). IRGC coastal batteries that targeted her yesterday destroyed in overnight retaliatory strikes. No missiles fired at convoy today. Ship undamaged. Remains lead Hormuz escort.

name: USS Florida
area: Gulf of Oman (approx.) — repositioned closer to Hormuz
notes: Ohio-class guided missile submarine. Carries up to 154 Tomahawk cruise missiles. Day 14: Launched Tomahawks in overnight retaliatory strikes on 5 IRGC coastal battery positions. Exact position classified.

name: USS John Finn
notes: Detached from CSG-3 to Red Sea for Houthi missile defense and merchant shipping escort. Key node in southern blockade.
